title: Creamy Almond Chicken Tikka
description: A classic Indian-inspired dish with the added twist of creamy almond sauce. This recipe is perfect for a special occasion or dinner party.
instructions: 1. In a large resealable plastic bag, combine yogurt, lemon juice, garam masala, cumin powder, salt, and black pepper. Add the chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
2. Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for 6-8 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
3. In a blender or food processor, combine almonds, heavy cream, and grill seasoning. Blend until smooth.
4. In a large saucepan, combine the almond sauce and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until heated through.
5. Serve the chicken with the creamy almond sauce and garnish with additional sliced almonds, if desired.
6. Serve with basmati rice and naan bread, if desired.
